rulings.Case Title: ALFREDO CHAVEZ VS. ASBESTPS DEFTS(B/P) AS RELECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Volkswagen Group Of America, Inc. For Stay And Change Of Venue On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.'S Amended Motion For Stay And Change Of Venue On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: RUFUS ALLEN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 2, PLAINTIFFS RUFUS ALLEN AND GEORGIA ALLEN'S MOTION For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS Granted. No opposition filed. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS' et al VS. MATTHEW C KRAMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Third Amended Complaint, Third Cause Of Action For "Deceit Based On Concelment"
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANTS MATTHEW KRAMER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Third Amended Complaint, Third Cause Of Action For "Deceit Based On ConceAlment" IS Off calendar per moving party. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LAWRENCE LIN VS. ZEN COMPOUND, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Fifth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 4, PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE LIN'S Motion For Leave To File Fifth Amended Complaint. GRANT PER OCTOBER 15, 2009 ENTRY REFLECTING THAT PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO THE FILING OF A 5TH AMENDED COMPLAINT. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA ISABEL ORTEGA PEREZ VS. SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANT SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER OVERRULED, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLIED WITH THE GOVERNMENT CLAIM STATUTEs. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: FELIX BRAYNIN et al VS. VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANTS BIANA CHERNOGUZ AND VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER WITHDRAWN AND OFF CALENDAR. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: FELIX BRAYNIN et al VS. VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANTS BIANA CHERNOGUZ AND VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ MOTION TO STRIKE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED. DEFENDANTS FAIL TO SHOW HOW THE PRAYER FOR RELIEF IS IMPROPER UNDER CCP SECTION 436(a). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: TRINIDAD MARTINEZ VS. DYNALECTRIC CO., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 7, PLAINTIFF TRINIDAD MARTINEZ Motion To Amend. MOTION DENIED. MOTION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1324 AND PLAINTIFF'S DELAY IN SEEKING THE INSTANT RELIEF PREJUDICEs DEFENDANTS GIVEN THE EXISTING STATE OF DISCOVERY, THE TRIAL DATE, AND THE TIMING PROVISION OF CCP SECTION 437c. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC DBA GREAT WESTERN VS. SHOOT THE BISCUIT, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motions To Vacate Default And Default Judgment;Adn Strike
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT GORDON BOE'S Motions To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; And Strike. MOTION GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT BOE ONLY, IMPROPER SUB-SERVICE. THE CORPORATION HAS NOT MOVED TO VACATE THE DEFAULT AND BOE'S COUNSEL DOES NOT REPRESENT THAT ENTITY. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION, LOCAL 1000 et al VS. ARNOLD SCHWARZENEGGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Leave To Intervene In Jan Frank'S Verified X-Petition For Writ Of Mandate Or Writ Of Prohibition And X-Complaint For Declaratory And Injunctive Relief
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, October 27, 2009, line 10, INTERVENOR STATIONARY ENGINEERS LOCAL 39, INTERNATIONAL Re-Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Leave To Intervene In Jan Frank's Verified Cross-Petition For Writ Of Mandate Or Writ Of Prohibition And Cross-Complaint For Declaratory And Injunctive Relief.
